overview: Premium luxury website for Players Hub Club, a high-end snooker and pool club in Gwalior, India. Cinematic, immersive design with dark luxury aesthetics, metallic gold accents, and snooker green branding.
features: Cinematic full-screen hero with animated stats
6-page site: Home, About, Tables & Pricing, Tournaments, Gallery, Contact
Premium pricing display for snooker and pool tables
Contact page with Google Maps embed
Luxury animations and hover glow effects
